introduction.title: About Photosa
introduction.content: Photosa is a modern, privacy-friendly photo management tool inspired by Picasa. Organize, browse, and enjoy your photos and videos with powerful local features and a beautiful interface—no cloud required.
introduction.summary: Photosa helps you rediscover and manage your memories with ease.

resources.title: Resources
resources.content: Explore additional resources and documentation for Photosa.

about.markdown:
# About Photasa

Photasa is a modern, privacy-friendly local photo management tool inspired by the classic Picasa.
It enables you to efficiently browse, organize, and manage your photos and videos with a beautiful interface and powerful local features—no cloud required.

## Key Features

- Smart local import and management for photos and videos
- Fast thumbnail generation and preview
- Multi-language UI and theme switching
- Batch operations and efficient search
- Data privacy and security

## Resources

- [Project Documentation](/docs/resources)
- [Open Source Repository](https://github.com/your-org/picasa-vue)
- [☕️ Buy Me a Coffee](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/yourname)

Press `Esc` to exit
